title: Doing study or training
content:
## Doing study or training , Te mahi ako, te mahi whakangungu rānei
Find out ways to do study or training.
- Featured guide How to apply for study or training Me pēhea te tono mō ngā akoranga, te whakangungu rānei Ready to sign up to study or training? Tino pai! There are a few steps you need to go through – just take them one at a time, you’ll get there.

## How to apply for study or training

## Me pēhea te tono mō ngā akoranga, te whakangungu rānei
Ready to sign up to study or training? Tino pai! There are a few steps you need to go through – just take them one at a time, you’ll get there.
- Guide Change or progress your career Hurihia, ka koke rānei i tō aramahi Even if you’ve got a job, more study or training can bring exciting challenges and better pay. Here are some ideas about how to move forward if you like the job you have now, or if you’re looking for a complete change.

## Change or progress your career

## Hurihia, ka koke rānei i tō aramahi
Even if you’ve got a job, more study or training can bring exciting challenges and better pay. Here are some ideas about how to move forward if you like the job you have now, or if you’re looking for a complete change.
- Guide About adult and community education Mō te mātauranga pakeke me te hapori If you’re looking for new skills or a confidence boost, you might find help right around the corner. Adult and Community Education (ACE) is a friendly way to learn in your own community. Most courses are short and easy to fit into your life.

## About adult and community education

## Mō te mātauranga pakeke me te hapori
If you’re looking for new skills or a confidence boost, you might find help right around the corner. Adult and Community Education (ACE) is a friendly way to learn in your own community. Most courses are short and easy to fit into your life.
- Guide Distance and online learning Mō te ako tawhiti me te ako tuihono Want to get qualifications without changing your whole life? Distance and online learning might be right for you. You can do full programmes, or bite-sized pieces. There are hundreds of different options for you to choose from.

## Distance and online learning

## Mō te ako tawhiti me te ako tuihono
Want to get qualifications without changing your whole life? Distance and online learning might be right for you. You can do full programmes, or bite-sized pieces. There are hundreds of different options for you to choose from.
- Guide Study and training if you need learning support Te ako me te whakangungu ki te hiahia koe i te tautoko ako If you’re a student who is disabled, neurodivergent or needs extra learning support for any reason, there are plenty of options to help you succeed in your tertiary education goals. A wide range of support is usually available for your study or training and you can use this right through your programme or course.

## Study and training if you need learning support

## Te ako me te whakangungu ki te hiahia koe i te tautoko ako
If you’re a student who is disabled, neurodivergent or needs extra learning support for any reason, there are plenty of options to help you succeed in your tertiary education goals. A wide range of support is usually available for your study or training and you can use this right through your programme or course.
- Guide Improve your literacy and numeracy Whakapikia ō kaha reo matatini me te pāngarau Do you struggle with reading, writing or maths? You’re not alone – many people in school and work find these things hard as well. Getting better at these literacy and numeracy skills makes it easier to learn anything you want to, and can take you closer to getting into your dream mahi.

## Improve your literacy and numeracy

## Whakapikia ō kaha reo matatini me te pāngarau
Do you struggle with reading, writing or maths? You’re not alone – many people in school and work find these things hard as well. Getting better at these literacy and numeracy skills makes it easier to learn anything you want to, and can take you closer to getting into your dream mahi.
